title: Magic longbow
wikitext:
{{External|rs=Magic shieldbow|rsc=Magic Longbow}} {{Infobox Item |name = Magic longbow |image = [[File:Magic longbow.png]] |release = [[25 March]] [[2002]] |update = Latest RuneScape News (25 March 2002) |members = Yes |quest = No |tradeable = Yes |placeholder = Yes |equipable = Yes |stackable = No |noteable = Yes |options = Wield, Drop |examine = A nice sturdy magical bow. |value = 2560 |weight = 1.814 |exchange = Yes |id = 859 }} [[File:Magic longbow detail.png|left|110px]] The '''magic longbow''' is a [[longbow (weapon)|longbow]] fletched from [[magic logs]]. It requires a [[Ranged]] level of 50 to wield and can fire [[arrows]] up to [[amethyst arrows|amethyst]]. Players can make a magic longbow with a [[Fletching]] level of 85 by cutting an [[Magic longbow (u)|unstrung magic longbow]] from [[magic logs]], granting 91.5 Fletching [[experience]], and then stringing unstrung magic longbow with a [[bow string]], granting a further 91.5 experience. Fletching a magic longbow from [[magic logs]] and a [[bow string]] will profit {{Coins|{{GEP|Magic longbow}}-({{GEP|Magic logs}}+{{GEP|Bow string}})}} while fletching a magic longbow from a [[magic longbow (u)]] and a [[bow string]] will profit {{Coins|{{GEP|Magic longbow}}-({{GEP|Magic longbow (u)}}+{{GEP|Bow string}})}}. ==Combat stats== {{Infobox Bonuses |astab = 0 |aslash = 0 |acrush = 0 |amagic = 0 |arange = +69 |dstab = 0 |dslash = 0 |dcrush = 0 |dmagic = 0 |drange = 0 |str = 0 |rstr = 0 |mdmg = 0 |prayer = 0 |slot = 2h |speed = 6 |attackrange = 10 |combatstyle = Bow |image = [[File:Magic longbow equipped.png|150px]] |altimage = [[File:Magic longbow equipped female.png|160px]] }} {{CombatStyles|Bow|speed=6|attackrange=10}} ==Special attack== [[File:Powershot.gif|thumb|230px|A player performing the magic longbow's special attack, ''Powershot''.]] The magic longbow's special attack, ''Powershot'', is [[Successful hit|guaranteed to hit]] the target. This consumes 35% of the player's special attack energy. This special attack is also shared with the [[magic comp bow]]. ''Powershot'' uses a custom form of damage calculation that does not take into account offensive Prayers (such as [[Eagle Eye]]) when determining a player's [[Maximum ranged hit#Calculating your maximum ranged hit|maximum Ranged hit]].{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1167133164642480131|date=29 August 2019|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/102769|archivedate=23 May 2021|quote=[The special attack for rune throwing axes, magic shortbow, and magic longbow all ignore the active range boosting prayers for the special attack, and this ends up with a lower max hit during special attack. is this intentional?] They always had their own special calculations for effective accuracy/damage (...)}} The following formula can be used to calculate the max hit of ''Powershot'':

\text{Maximum Hit} =\left\lfloor 0.5+\frac{(\text{Visible Ranged Level} + 10) *(\text{Ammo Ranged Strength} +64)}{640} \right\rfloor {{efn|name=level|Only the player's visible ranged level matters. Boosts given through prayers and Void Knight armour are ignored.}} {{efn|name=stance|A stance bonus of 10 is used regardless of attack style used.}} {{efn|name=ammo|The ranged strength bonus of the player's armour and gear is ignored. Only the ranged strength bonus of the player's ammo is used.}} {{efn|name=slayer|The bonus damage usually provided by wearing a Slayer helmet (i), Salve amulet (i) or Salve amulet (ei) is ignored.}} {{notelist}} ==Creation== {{Recipe |skill1 = Fletching |skill1lvl = 85 |skill1boostable = Yes |skill1exp = 91.5 |members = Yes |ticks = 2 |mat1 = Magic longbow (u) |mat2 = Bow string |output1 = Magic longbow }} ==Products== {{Uses material list|Magic longbow}} ==Money making== {{Mmgsection|Stringing magic longbows}} ==Item sources== {{Drop sources|Magic longbow}} ==Comparison between other ranged weapons== {{Ranged weapons comparison}} ==Treasure Trails== {{EmoteClueHeader}} {{EmoteClue|tier=elite|emote=Headbang|location=Outside the [[Fight Arena Bar]]|item1=Magic longbow|item2=Pirate bandana|img2=Pirate bandana (blue)|item3=dragon necklace|cost2={{min|{{GEP|Pirate bandana (blue)}}|{{GEP|Pirate bandana (white)}}|{{GEP|Pirate bandana (brown)}}|{{GEP|Pirate bandana (red)}}}}}} {{EmoteClueBottom}} ==Changes== {{Subject changes header}} {{Subject changes |date = 14 June 2004 |update = Special Attacks |change = The item was given a special attack, ''Powershot''. }} {{Subject changes footer}} ==References== {{Reflist}} {{Ranged weapons}} [[Category:Weapons with Special attacks]]
